series_metadata.series_description: Records covering all documentation generated during the course of an ETMP review. Includes planning documents, narratives, diagrams, vulnerability assessments, penetration test checklists, tests, reports, correspondence, and agency review.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: After final agency review and sign-off, immediately destroy. ; Paper: Retain the three most recent agency/program-specific assessments. Send older assessments to secure storage facility for shredding., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
